title: Robot Report 母公司 WTWH Media 更名为 Arrowfly
summary: The Arrowfly name unifies more than 40 brands under a new identity built for the future of B2B content and events. The post The Robot Report parent company, WTWH Media, rebrands as Arrowfly appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：The Robot Report parent company, WTWH Media, rebrands as Arrowfly）
